title: guizotia oblonga
intro: Guizotia oblonga, also known as gold of nug, is a plant species of the daisy family that is native to the Himalayan region and other parts of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Guizotia oblonga is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as an antidote for poisoning. The plant's seeds and oil are often used in herbal preparations, such as oil infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be taken internally or applied topically for therapeutic purposes.
